name: orbitalMechanics
_note: astronomy.orbitalMechanics is a pure-compute LENS_ACTIONS handler (server/domains/astronomy.js, registerLensAction → 3-arg (ctx, artifact, params)). It applies Kepler's third law T²=a³/M. The fail-CLOSED contract: any non-finite or overflow-magnitude (>1e15) input is REJECTED via finiteOr() rather than emitting Infinity/NaN into periodYears (which JSON.stringify would silently coerce to null). Eccentricity is clamped to [0, 0.999999] and centralMass/semiMajorAxis defaulted to a positive value, so Kepler's law can never divide-by-zero or root a negative. This macro registers in LENS_ACTIONS only (not the MACROS/runMacro spec map the assassin enumerates), so the assassin drives it statically against this contract; the live lens (/lenses/astronomy SkyChartWorkbench + ActionPanel) reaches it through /api/lens/run.
